# Island AI

> AI companions and personality assessments that help you understand yourself — through MBTI, Enneagram, tarot, and soulful conversation, available 24/7.

## Product

- [Home](/): Discover your AI companions and explore personality assessments.
- [Assessments](/assessment): Browse all self-discovery quizzes — MBTI, Enneagram, Zodiac, Emotion, and more.
- [MBTI Assessment](/assessment/mbti): Discover your 16-type personality profile.
- [Enneagram Assessment](/assessment/enneagram): Explore your core motivations and fears.
- [Zodiac Assessment](/assessment/zodiac): Uncover insights through astrological archetypes.
- [Emotion Assessment](/assessment/emotion): Understand your emotional patterns and triggers.
- [Compatibility](/assessment/compatibility): See how personality types connect and clash.
- [Daily Tarot](/daily-tarot): Draw a daily card for guidance and reflection.

## Companions

- [Agent Archive](/archive): Meet the full cast of AI companions and their backstories.

## Company

- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for premium features.
- [Welcome](/welcome): Onboarding guide for new visitors.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach out to the Island AI team.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Rules and conditions for using the platform.
